chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1307 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 8 a/w reply as at A 2. For hearing of main case 20.11.2025 Mr. Raham Ali Rind, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Akbar, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Kamran, Assistant Advocate General SI Naseem PS Shah Latif Town, Karachi --------- Through instant petition, the petitioner claims following relief:- a) Direct the respondent No.1 to 4 to take strict legal action against the 05 may be prosecuted under the law and for do not use the black cheque numbers, in lodging the FIR A-71057551, 71057552, A-71057553, A-71057554 of Meezan Bank but not issued in the name of the respondent No.5. b) To direct the respondent No.1 to 04 to provide the requisite legal protection to the Petitioner in accordance with law.” Pursuant to court notice SHO PS Shah Latif Town, Malir, Karachi has filed its reply wherein it is stated that FIR No.1462/2025 under Section 489-F PPC has been registered against the petitioner on complaint of respondent No.5 Samiullah Khan. Since the purpose of filing this petition has become infructuous on registration of FIR even this Court cannot restrain the police officials from registration of FIR. This petition being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE Nadir*
